sections.paragraph:
προσϰόπτω [πρός, κόπτω]

—1. ‘cause to strike against’, tr., in imagery w. focus on experiencing harm strike against Mt 4:6; Lk 4:11.

—2. ‘hit with relative force’, intr.

—a. of stormy weather, strike Mt 7:27.

—b. abs., of inadvertent foot movement to stumble J 11:9f.

—3. in imagery of 1 and 2 w. ext. to the moral or spiritual sphere, stumble

—a. of acting contrary to conviction brought on through another’s lack of concern Ro 14:21.

—b. of negative reaction based on dissatisfaction Ro 9:32; 1 Pt 2:8.
